seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Serpentine and Seville Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Serpentine vs Seville Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Serpentine and Seville Grove.
heading: Serpentine vs Seville Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Serpentine, Western Australia and Seville Grove, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Serpentine has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Seville Grove (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Serpentine or Seville Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Serpentine has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Seville Grove scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Serpentine scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Seville Grove scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Serpentine or Seville Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Serpentine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
